claimText: Brown Provost guidance says any unapproved use of AI to complete assignments would be covered by Brown’s Academic Code and Graduate Student Edition Academic Code.

citation.citationTitle: Potential impact of AI on our academic mission
citation.publisher: Brown University Office of the Provost
